---
applyTo: "src/[projectname].Domain.Tests/**/*.cs, src/[projectname].Application.Tests/**/*UnitTests.cs"
---

Load skills based on your task:

- **`backend-unit-tests`** — for unit test files (`*UnitTests.cs`, `[projectname].Domain.Tests`): InMemorySqliteTestScope, Assert.* only (no FluentAssertions), UnitTest CategoryTrait, fast isolated test structure.
